data.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendments

### Update "5-dimension" references to "6-dimension"
The existing complexity-evaluator.md references "5-dimension rubric" in the frontmatter description and body headings. When adding Dimension 6, also update:
- Frontmatter description: "5-dimension rubric" → "6-dimension rubric"
- Body heading: "Five-Dimension Rubric" → "Six-Dimension Rubric" (or equivalent)
- Any other count references in the file

The existing test `test_complexity_evaluator_agent_body_five_dimension_rubric` checks for "Dimension" headings and 5 dimension terms. After adding blast_radius, update the existing test to also check for "Blast" or "blast_radius" in the dimension terms list.

### Update Classification Rules table
The Classification Rules table (promotion rules section) must include: "blast_radius complex_override = true → COMPLEX (always)". Without this, the classification rules are contradictory with Step 2.5's forcing instruction.

Additional AC:
- [ ] Classification Rules updated with blast-radius forcing
  Verify: grep -qi "blast.*radius\|complex_override" plugins/dso/agents/complexity-evaluator.md | head -1
- [ ] "5-dimension" references updated
  Verify: ! grep -qi "five.dimension\|5.dimension" plugins/dso/agents/complexity-evaluator.md
